About me

I'm an Exact Sciences undergraduate at Federal University of Juiz de Fora, with a desire to learn further in web development.

What i'm doing

  • Web development and design

    For the moment, i'm learning to build, design and develop websites with HTML, CSS and JavaScript.

  • Photography, video editing and movie-making

    I volunteered as the Military School of Belo Horizonte as head of the Media Club, working as a photographer, video editor and cinegraphist.
